title: Website Launched !
description: The website was designed and developed by Léo Tosku (L-DEV). Stay tuned for regular updates.
content: Welcome to the official Dranima website — a place to follow development progress, view screenshots, and read the latest news.

title: Prototype - January 2025
description: The first prototype: battle foundations, UI, and Dranimae data.
content:
• Started battle programming.
  • Created a UI for the battle system.
  • Started creating and inserting Dranimae, their stats and moves.

title: Prototype - July 2025
description: Battle loop, Dranimae roster, and combat systems take shape.
content:
• Created the turn-by-turn system.
  • The turn order depends on the speed of Dranimae and their attack priority.
  • Added the 10 prototype Dranimae.
  • Added primitive icons for Dranimae faces.
  • Added moves, basic damage, stats, etc.
  • Added physical and magic moves.
  • Added the first area (might still receive changes).
  • Added sprites of Dranimae and move icons.
  • Added text at left for each action of your Dranimae.
  • Added a confirmation button when your Dranimae are ready to execute orders.
  • Added health bars that empty when taking damage.
  • Added a primitive music system.
  • Added a primitive camera system.
  • Sprites of trees randomly spawn on the battlefield in a round.
  • Can switch Dranimae at any moment or when they faint.
  • Can run away (depending on the speed of each team, your chances change).

title: Prototype - January 2026
description: Big quality-of-life improvements plus debug tools and VFX polish.
content:
• Slightly improved graphics and UI.
  • Created a debug menu allowing the creation of any allied team at any level.
  • Added a 1v2 system that is not working properly yet.
  • Added stats variations for attack, magic attack, defense, magic defense, speed, luck and aiming.
  • Added more songs.
  • Added primitive icons for moves.
  • Added primitive status effects.
  • Added primitive SFX.
  • Added primitive VFX for moves.
  • Added primitive victory screen and pass to the debug menu again.
  • Added TP (Talent Points) and SP (Skill Points) for Dranimae stats variation.
  • Added a better camera system, now being able to rotate and reset position.
  • Running away also brings back to the debug menu.
  • Fixed issues with the UI not working correctly when switching Dranimae.
  • Fixed many (12) issues making the game crash.
  • Fixed issues causing fainted Dranimae to keep battling.
  • Fixed issues causing the game to softlock if switching between menus too fast.
  • Optimized spriting animation to take less place on the player's disk.
  • Optimized VFX animation to take less place on the player's disk.
